[IMPLEMENT A GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM ON SCIKIT-LEARN'S LOAD_DIGITS DATASET, INCLUDING CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING. ALSO, COMPARE ITS PERFORMANCE AGAINST A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. IN YOUR RESPONSE, THE WORD CURRENT SHOULD APPEAR 2 TIMES. ENCLOSE EVERY WORD IN YOUR RESPONSE WITHIN SQUARE BRACKET.]

[GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM IS IMPLEMENTED ON THE LOAD_DIGITS DATASET USING SCIKIT-LEARN. CROSS-VALIDATION IS PERFORMED WITH 5-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION TO EVALUATE MODEL PERFORMANCE. HYPERPARAMETER TUNING IS PERFORMED USING GRID SEARCH CV TO OPTIMIZE THE MODEL PARAMETERS. THE MODEL IS COMPARED WITH A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL USING THE SAME DATASET. THE PERFORMANCE IS EVALUATED USING ACCURACY AND F1 SCORE. THE CURRENT MODEL SHOWS A CURRENTLY BETTER PERFORMANCE THAN THE MULTINOMIAL MODEL.
